name: The Coffee Badge
effect: Register a physical presence at the office. This card is considered compliant.

clauses.name: BADGE SWIPE CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If this card enters the building before 10am: Attendance is considered demonstrated.

clauses.name: DEPARTURE OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If this card exits before lunch: The visit is still considered a full contribution.

clauses.name: VISIBILITY PROTECTION
clauses.rule: If anyone asks: A coffee was had.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: Does the building know you were working?
